---
title: ""
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](photo.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="70%"}

# Victor Verde Neri

PhD Student in Sociology at UC San Diego

[email](mailto:vverdeneri@ucsd.edu) | [CV](/cv) | [GitHub](https://github.com/...)

:::
::::

Hi! My name is Victor Verde Neri. I am a Sociology PhD Student at UC San Diego. I study [your research area].

[Your research description paragraph here.]

**Contact:** vverdeneri [at] ucsd.edu
